ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "style" TEXT /* Description of the product style */,
  "item_number" TEXT /* Unique item number assigned to the product */,
  "store_sku" TEXT /* SKU number used in the store's inventory system */,
  "manufacturer_product_number" TEXT /* Manufacturer's product number for identification */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Current availability status of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Safety Gear, Clothing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product linked to this inventory record */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the product */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location within the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped) */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order is shipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "order_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order detail entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this detail belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product included in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the system login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, inventory) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order is shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier (e.g., USPS, UPS, FedEx) */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order from which the product is being returned */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was processed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the return (e.g., Refund, Exchange) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the promotion applies to */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "code" TEXT /* Promotional code for the offer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Whether the customer verified their purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the payment method */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment method (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Payment service provider */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number or ID for the payment method */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date for the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alt text for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the video belongs to */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_videos_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
